text: S&P 500 ends volatile day slightly lower as Iran conflict keeps traders on edge: Live updates - CNBC
fullText: Stocks reversed course from their lows Monday and closed higher across the board after Trump gave signs that an end may be in sight for the U.S.-Iran war.

text: Iran begins laying mines in Strait of Hormuz, sources say - CNN
fullText: Iran has begun laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz, the world’s most important energy chokepoint that carries about one-fifth of all crude oil, according to two people familiar with US intelligence reporting on the issue.

text: Sources: Jets get their QB, trade with Raiders for Geno Smith - ESPN
fullText: The Jets are trading for the Raiders' Geno Smith, reuniting the quarterback with the team that drafted him in 2013, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.

text: US Didn’t Escort Tanker Through Hormuz, Refuting Wright Post - Bloomberg.com
fullText: The US said no oil tanker has been escorted by its navy through the Strait of Hormuz, refuting an earlier, since-deleted social media post by Energy Secretary Chris Wright.

text: How the Iran war could hit Americans’ grocery bills - Fox Business
fullText: The Iran war is driving oil shock that may reshape consumer spending patterns as businesses face mounting transportation costs and difficult pricing pressures.

text: War expands to central Beirut as Israeli strike kills Iranians in luxury hotel - BBC

text: Lurking dementia risk exposed by breakthrough test 25 years before symptoms - Fox News

text: How the Iran war has put the small island of Cyprus abruptly on Europe's security radar - CBS News

text: HMS Dragon sets sail from Portsmouth and heads to Cyprus - BBC
fullText: The UK has deployed the Type 45 Destroyer to the Mediterranean region, after an Iranian drone struck the runway at the RAF Akrotiri base in Cyprus on 1 March.
